overview: Skeleton Mage is a Normal-class Undead monster found in Crypt, Goblin Cave, Ice Cavern, Inferno, Ruins, Ship Graveyard. 3 grades: Common, Elite, Nightmare. Base stats (Common): 50 HP, 20 physical damage, 100 move speed, ActionSpeed 0. ImpactResistance 3, MaxImpactEndurance 5. Has a Staggered reaction in its ability set. 3 attacks, 0 combo chains. Highest damage: Attack at 0% ratio (0 base damage). Sight range 900, combat radius 500. Elite gains 1 exclusive abilityy: Elite. Nightmare gains 1 exclusive abilityy: Nightmare.

combo_flow.description: This monster does not use combo chains. Each attack is selected independently by the AI.

strategies.title: Has Stagger Reaction (ImpactRes 3, Endurance 5)
strategies.description: This monster has a Staggered ability in its ability set, meaning it has a stagger reaction animation. ImpactResistance: 3, MaxImpactEndurance: 5.

strategies.title: Elemental Weaknesses: Fire, Divine, Earth
strategies.description: Significant elemental weaknesses: Fire (-2500), Divine (-2000), Earth (-3000). Negative reduction values mean incoming damage of that type is amplified.

strategies.title: Projectile Reduction: 150
strategies.description: Has 150 ProjectileReductionMod, reducing physical projectile damage.

strategies.title: Elite Gains: Elite
strategies.description: Elite grade has 1 exclusive abilities not present in lower grades: Elite. These change the fight dynamics in Elite.

strategies.title: Nightmare Gains: Nightmare
strategies.description: Nightmare grade has 1 exclusive abilities not present in lower grades: Nightmare. These change the fight dynamics in Nightmare.

strategies.title: Detection Range: 900 units
strategies.description: Sight radius 900 units, loses target at 1300 units, 180° vision angle.

strategies.title: Combat Range: combat area radius 500, ability check distance 600
strategies.description: Combat area radius 500. Ability check distance 600. Ability attack delay: 1s.

strategies.title: Flee/Kite Behavior
strategies.description: flees when target within 500 units. re-engages at 400 unit peace distance.

elite_differences: ActionSpeed 0 → 100 in Elite — attacks animate faster
ActionSpeed 0 → 200 in Nightmare — attacks animate faster

ai_perception.damage_description: Reacts to damage from any direction.
ai_perception.sight_description: Detects targets within 900 units. Loses target at 1300 units.
